content: بَعد مَا يِعَدّي اَلصيف هَيِبْتَدُوا مِن جِديد مَعَ اَلْسُوق اَلْأَخْضَر
translations: eng:after summer, they will start anew with the green market

transcriptions.arabizi: baAdama yiAaddiilseef hayibtidwa min gideed maAailsoo' il'achdar
